channel.title: Openai on Vijay Kodam
channel.description: Recent content in Openai on Vijay Kodam

item.title: LLM Pricing Comparison
item.description:
Compare API pricing for text tokens across major Large Language Model providers. All prices are per 1 million tokens in USD.

Click on any column header to sort the table.

Loading pricing data...

Failed to load pricing data. Please try again later.

Provider Model Input / MTok Cache Input / MTok Output / MTok

Sources:

  • OpenAI API Pricing
  • Anthropic Claude Pricing
  • Google Gemini API Pricing

item.title: Running Deepseek R1 locally
item.description:
Here is a video of Deepseek R1 running locally on my Macbook. Now that everyone is amazed by the low level of resource utilization and open weight model of Deepseek R1, installed 8B model locally.

With the help of ollama it is as simple as running a single command - “ollama run deepseek-r1:8b” You get your own private, local LLM running securely in your computer.

My prompt is “Generate a five line fairy tale about AI?”. In the video, you can see how before generating the response, it thinks. Thinking text is in between and tags.

Watch the video to read the five line fairy tale about AI.

Do you have any experience running Deepseek R1?

If you are new to my posts, I regularly post about AWS, EKS, Kubernetes and Cloud computing related topics. Do follow me in LinkedIn and visit my dev.to posts. You can find all my previous blog posts in my blog
